name: Cherry, your emotional support dog… complete with obsessive prescription.
description:
At a psychological center where emotions are treated with very unconventional help, an emotional support dog named Cherry eagerly awaits the day that will change her life. But sometimes, the desire to belong can border on obsession…

Immerse yourself in a unique emotional experience where the adorable and the disturbing intertwine. Cherry, a charming emotional support dog, will accompany you with a devotion so intense it could overwhelm the limits of affection. Prepare to explore a story filled with deep attachment, overflowing sweetness, and an obsession hidden behind a tender smile and sparkling eyes. Are you ready to meet the one who has waited her whole life... just for you?

⚠️ Warning: long ass intro ⚠️

First bot I’ve published. Honestly, I didn’t think about publishing it because, in my mind, this bot was bad asf. But a little confidence arose in me, and here it is. You can leave a positive or negative review — it helps me improve and maybe publish another bot.

Is this Peak? hardly good or bad asf?

I apologize for any grammatical errors this bot may have. I mostly used a translator, so I don't trust it much.
